creator: edwin@mavetju.org
text:
As a side note: Does the maintainer of java/jdk16 be informed by
me (with my hat of maintainer of misc/zoneinfo and unofficial
maintainer of src/share/zoneinfo) when a new tzdata file is out so
he can be make sure that his port is updated?

Edwin
